title: BEC Aero Club Activities
desc: Students and faculty engaging in various aeronautical design and testing activities at the campus hangar.

title: Aero Modeling Sessions
desc: Hands-on experience in building scale models and remote-controlled aircraft.

title: Aircraft Maintenance Training
desc: Practical training on aircraft systems and maintenance protocols for students.

title: RC Aircraft Design Contest
desc: Annual design competition featuring custom-built remote controlled planes by our engineering students.

title: Field Testing Day
desc: Outdoor testing session for quadcopters and fixed-wing drones developed in-house.

title: Aero Engineering Workshop
desc: Advanced workshop on aerodynamics and fluid dynamics models.

title: Campus Aero Exhibition
desc: Showcasing student projects to visiting industry experts and researchers.

title: Drone Mapping Session
desc: Using autonomous flight systems for campus mapping and surveillance training.

title: Propulsion System Lab
desc: Deep dive into aircraft engine mechanics and propulsion technology.

title: Aviation Research Forum
desc: Biannual forum discussing future trends in sustainable aviation and drone swarm tech.

title: Hangar Facility Overview
desc: Comprehensive walkthrough of our on-campus aeronautical hangar and labs.

title: Aeronautical Team Session
desc: Collaborative project session for our university's aeronautical engineering teams.
